title: ZXSnake Controls
description: Master ZXSnake's controls with smooth movement, quick reactions, and precise turns.

images.caption: Master the controls to survive longer and achieve higher scores.

sections.heading: Master the Controls
paragraphs: ZXSnake is easy to learn but rewards precise movement and quick decision-making. Every turn matters, so planning your route ahead is just as important as reacting quickly.
The more confidently you control the snake, the longer you'll survive and the higher your score will become.

featureShowcases.heading: Stay One Move Ahead
featureShowcases.summary: Good control is the key to surviving longer and reaching higher scores.
body: Success in ZXSnake comes from planning your next move before you need it. Anticipating corners, avoiding sudden direction changes, and staying aware of your surroundings will help you survive much longer.
Whether you're aiming for a new personal best or climbing the leaderboards, smooth and deliberate movement will always give you the advantage.
bullets: Improve your reactions as the snake grows longer.

image.caption: Every move brings you closer to a new high score.

summary: Mastering the controls is the first step towards surviving longer, earning higher scores, and climbing the leaderboards.
